description: Runtime bottleneck tracker — each entry records a perf fix landed in the generated-C backend (codegen_c2/hexa_cc.c + runtime.c).

entries.title: Inline cache for field/method lookup

design.scope: NK_FIELD_ACCESS (obj.field). Method-call IC deferred — codegen already lowers methods to direct C calls via ImplBlock, so there is no strcmp-chain to cache.
design.placement: Cache lives in the generated C file as `static HexaIC __hexa_ic_N = {0};` — one slot per emitted `obj.field` call site. Per-site monomorphic; 4-way poly deferred as stretch.
design.shape_key: (m.map.keys pointer, m.map.len). Struct constructors hexa_map_new + hexa_map_set insert keys in a fixed order; once a struct is built its keys array is stable, so the pair is a reliable shape id.
design.cache_value: int idx (the offset within m.map.vals). Hit returns m.map.vals[idx] in O(1).
design.invalidation: Any hexa_map_set that reallocs the keys array bumps the pointer; IC treats the next access as a miss and refills. hexa_map_remove shortens len; ditto.
design.hot_path_emission: Preprocessor macro `hexa_map_get_ic(M, KEY, IC)` — GCC statement-expression form so the compiler never emits a call in the monomorphic-hit case; slow path is an out-of-line static fn.
design.stats_gate: HEXA_IC_STATS=1 installs atexit to dump hits/misses/rate. Unset → counter bumps compiled out of the hot path via a runtime flag checked once.

results.bench: bench/oop_heavy.hexa — 40M field reads on 3-field struct (p.x, p.y)
bench/oop_heavy_wide.hexa — 20M reads on 10-field struct, reading last field
results.notes: On wide structs the linear-scan baseline walks ~10 strcmps per access; IC collapses to O(1). This matches the spec's 2-4x target for oop-heavy workloads.

regression.fibonacci: PASS (no struct use — IC emission is zero, flat wall)
regression.struct_patterns: pre-existing compile error (`nil` identifier) — same failure with and without IC, not a regression

limits_and_followups: 3-field structs see only ~15% speedup because the baseline linear scan is already short (2-3 strcmps). The win compounds with struct width.
Method calls already go through direct C fn addrs (StructName__method) — no IC needed; spec's NK_METHOD_CALL branch is effectively pre-optimized at codegen time.
Polymorphic (4-slot) IC deferred: struct reuse across different types at the same site is rare in current corpus.
HexaVal ABI (32-byte by-value) still dominates — further wins need either (a) NaN-box (rt#38) to shrink HexaVal, or (b) arg-register tuning.
